subject: Create ChatGLM2 patch for torch_export.py
description:
Based on export errors, create chatglm2_export.py patch file similar to existing gpt_oss_export.py and glm4_moe_export.py patterns. Should handle:
1. Layout normalization (sequence-first → batch-first)
2. Config key mapping (multi_query_group_num → num_key_value_heads, kv_channels → head_dim)
3. Custom RoPE handling (either patch to canonical form or prepare for IR recognition)
